name: zeffect_anim_clear_activation_records
description: zEffect_Anim::ClearActivationRecords frees the activation record table and resets its count.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare currently fails for zEffect_Anim::ClearActivationRecords: 11 unmasked mismatches after masking 16 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 40 bytes and the VC object body is 48 bytes with 9 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.
The native smoke verifies activation record table cleanup through zEffect_Anim::Shutdown.
